commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Discord progress-mode suppression logic and adds focused tests for an empty progress-preview configuration.

PR surface: Source +23, Tests +51. Total +74 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: the default progress-mode path still suppresses default tool progress before a draft is visible. I did not run a live Discord/Codex reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor revision and real Discord proof are needed; missing external real behavior proof prevents routing this to ClawSweeper repair automation.

target.title: fix(discord): preserve tool updates when progress preview is empty
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes Discord progress-mode suppression so default/block tool updates remain visible when the progress preview lane is configured but stays empty.

## Issue/Motivation

When Discord uses `streaming.mode=progress`, OpenClaw suppresses standalone tool/block messages because progress drafts normally provide the operator-visible status lane. In the fast-tool / empty-preview-lane case, no progress draft is actually rendered, so suppressing those messages leaves operators blind.

## Changes

- Avoid suppressing default tool progress for progress-mode configs that cannot render any preview content (`label: false`, `toolProgress: false`, no commentary).
- Keep block-reply suppression tied to an active/non-empty progress preview lane, while preserving suppression when the progress draft is actually visible.
- Add Discord and compositor regression coverage for the empty-preview-lane case.

## Testing

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-discord.config.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config .tmp-vitest-channels.config.ts src/channels/streaming.test.ts src/channels/progress-draft-compositor.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts src/channels/streaming.test.ts src/channels/progress-draft-compositor.test.ts` (repo config currently excludes `src/channels/**`, so this reports no test files; targeted temp config above was used for these files)
- `node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/channels/streaming.ts src/channels/progress-draft-compositor.ts src/channels/progress-draft-compositor.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.draft-preview.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- Secret scan over `git diff origin/main...HEAD`

Fixes #87704
target.author: lin-hongkuan
